body:
[T:R ADDON](https://modrinth.com/mod/tensura-reincarnated)

# DELETE CONFIGS WHEN YOU UPDATE

T:R Addon
Hosting 2 New Races
Insectoids  And Elementals, With Configurable Evolution EP Values

Intrinsic Skills of the races:

Insect: Dragon Skin,Analytical Appraisal



Insectar: Magic Resistance


Lesser Spirit: Chant Anullment, Thought Acceleration, Physical Attack Resistance one of 7 Magic elemental transforms and their respective resistance

Pixie: Telepathy

Dryad and Greater Spirit: Physical Attack Nullification

Greater Spirit: Magic Resistance

Spirit Lord and Divine Insect: Divine Ki Release






Note: dragon skin is subsitute as i don't know how to do skills yet will be changed to exoskeleton later
